title: security_service
description: One account-level security service enablement record — one record per AWS SecurityHub, Macie, Inspector, or GCP Security Command Center. Policies check that required security services are enabled.

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

service_type.description: Service category: siem, vulnerability_scanner, dlp, threat_detection, cspm.

is_enabled.description: Service is active and monitoring the account.
